zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Seton於1368年出生在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，她的父親Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton21歲，母親Janet Fleming17歲。她和James Dunbar of Moray至少有1個女兒。她去世於1466年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Seton于1368年出生在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，她的父亲Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton21岁，母亲Janet Fleming17岁。她和James Dunbar of Moray至少有1个女儿。她去世于1466年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Seton was born in 1368, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, was 21 and her mother, Janet Fleming, was 17. She had at least 1 daughter with James Dunbar of Moray. She died in 1466, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Seton est née en 1368, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Janet Fleming, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec James Dunbar of Moray. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Seton 1368 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton 21 und ihre Mutter Janet Fleming 17. Sie hatte mit James Dunbar of Moray mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Seton è nata il nel 1368 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Janet Fleming, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con James Dunbar of Moray. Morì nel 1466, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Setonが1368年にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Seton 1st Lord Setonは21歳，母Janet Flemingは17歳であった。彼女はJames Dunbar of Morayとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1466年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Seton(이)가 1368년 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Fleming(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 James Dunbar of Moray(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Seton nasceu em 1368, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Janet Fleming, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com James Dunbar of Moray. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Seton родилась в 1368 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Fleming, 17. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от James Dunbar of Moray. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Seton nació en 1368, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Janet Fleming, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con James Dunbar of Moray. Murió en 1466, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 98 años.
